error.msg: Function parameter 'rhs_dests' should be passed by const reference.
error.verbose: Parameter 'rhs_dests' is passed by value. It could be passed as a const reference which is usually faster and recommended in C++.

location.info: Function parameter 'rhs_dests' should be passed by const reference.

error.msg: Consecutive return, break, continue, goto or throw statements are unnecessary.
error.verbose: Consecutive return, break, continue, goto or throw statements are unnecessary. The second statement can never be executed, and so should be removed.

error.msg: Consecutive return, break, continue, goto or throw statements are unnecessary.
error.verbose: Consecutive return, break, continue, goto or throw statements are unnecessary. The second statement can never be executed, and so should be removed.

error.msg: syntax error
error.verbose: syntax error

error.msg: There is an unknown macro here somewhere. Configuration is required. If GADGETLIB_ASSERT is a macro then please configure it.
error.verbose: There is an unknown macro here somewhere. Configuration is required. If GADGETLIB_ASSERT is a macro then please configure it.

error.msg: Consider using std::accumulate algorithm instead of a raw loop.
error.verbose: Consider using std::accumulate algorithm instead of a raw loop.

error.msg: Clarify calculation precedence for '&' and '?'.
error.verbose: Suspicious calculation. Please use parentheses to clarify the code. The code ''a&b?c:d'' should be written as either ''(a&b)?c:d'' or ''a&(b?c:d)''.

error.verbose: syntax error

error.msg: syntax error
error.verbose: syntax error

error.verbose: syntax error

error.msg: syntax error
error.verbose: syntax error

error.msg: Statements following 'return' will never be executed.
error.verbose: Statements following 'return' will never be executed.

error.msg: Consider using std::transform algorithm instead of a raw loop.
error.verbose: Consider using std::transform algorithm instead of a raw loop.

error.msg: Consider using std::accumulate algorithm instead of a raw loop.
error.verbose: Consider using std::accumulate algorithm instead of a raw loop.

error.msg: The scope of the variable 'immflag' can be reduced.
error.verbose: The scope of the variable 'immflag' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops. Here is an example where cppcheck will write that the scope for 'i' can be reduced:\012void f(int x)\012{\012 int i = 0;\012 if (x) {\012 // it's safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 for (int n = 0; n < 10; ++n) {\012 // it is possible but not safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 do_something(&i);\012 }\012 }\012}\012When you see this message it is always safe to reduce the variable scope 1 level.

error.msg: The scope of the variable 'des' can be reduced.
error.verbose: The scope of the variable 'des' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops. Here is an example where cppcheck will write that the scope for 'i' can be reduced:\012void f(int x)\012{\012 int i = 0;\012 if (x) {\012 // it's safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 for (int n = 0; n < 10; ++n) {\012 // it is possible but not safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 do_something(&i);\012 }\012 }\012}\012When you see this message it is always safe to reduce the variable scope 1 level.

error.verbose: The scope of the variable 'a1' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops.
